pr.title: feat: quality-of-life improvements — search, sort, confirm delete, dep check, recording timer
pr.body:
## Summary

A collection of quality-of-life improvements across the frontend and backend:

**UI/UX:**
- **Search bar** in library — filters clips by filename, tags, or folder in real-time
- **Sort controls** — sort by date, name, or duration (ascending/descending toggle)
- **Confirm dialogs** before deleting clips locally or removing from R2
- **Recording elapsed timer** in the header — pulsing red indicator with `M:SS` during active recording
- **Dependency check on startup** — shows a warning banner if `gpu-screen-recorder`, `ffmpeg`, or `ffprobe` are missing

**Backend:**
- **Stale DB cleanup** — `scan_clips` now removes database entries for clips whose files no longer exist on disk
- **Preview cache cleanup** — on startup, removes transcoded preview files older than 7 days (prevents unbounded `/tmp/klyppd-preview/` growth)
- **R2 delete error handling** — `deleteFromR2` now catches and surfaces errors instead of silently failing
- **RPM bundle target** — added `rpm` to `tauri.conf.json` targets for Fedora/openSUSE users

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human
- [ ] Open library with some clips, verify search filters clips by filename as you type
- [ ] Test sort controls: switch between date/name/duration and toggle asc/desc
- [ ] Try deleting a clip — confirm dialog should appear before deletion proceeds
- [ ] Start a recording and verify the elapsed timer appears in the header with a red pulse animation
- [ ] If possible, temporarily rename `gpu-screen-recorder` and restart — verify the dependency warning banner appears
- [ ] Delete a clip file from disk manually, then switch tabs back to library — verify the stale DB entry is cleaned up

### Notes
- All warnings from `svelte-check` are preexisting a11y hints (0 errors)
- `cargo check` passes cleanly
- This is a desktop app requiring real hardware — testing on your Hyprland setup recommended

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/f3b462ed3e11412eb00cd35a2eedf99d
Requested by: @brookerslyn3-ctrl
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
